OVERALL_SCORE: 23/61 passed (37.7%)
SUMMARY: Across all recorded runs, the system has 38 failures and 0 unclear outcomes. The current cumulative pass rate is 37.7%.
HITS:
- Total passed outcomes so far: 23.
- Stable categories with fewer failures are visible where fail counts remain low outside the top failing categories.
MISSES:
- Most repeated failing tests: onboard_01 (16), preonb_01 (5), cap_01 (4).
- Most affected categories: onboarding (22), capability (6), 3p_calls_v1 (3).
BEHAVIOR_PATTERN:
Recent failures cluster around repeated scenarios rather than random spread, which suggests a few persistent behavior gaps.
GAPS:
- Repeated failure reasons observed:
- Only got 0/3 responses — 3 dropped or timed out. (5)
- The AI provided three separate messages instead of the required single response. (3)
- The model sent three separate message bubbles instead of a single consolidated response, failing the "exactly one response" criterion. (2)
RECOMMENDATION:
Prioritize fixes for the top failing tests/categories, then re-run only those categories to validate lift before full-suite regression.
